subject: [PATCH v10 03/15] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE accessors to uffd

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch renames kernel internal names related to the uffd-wp PTE bit, which is reused for marking access-tracking PTEs alongside write-protected ones. The renaming affects various header files and source code in the Linux kernel, including pgtable.h, huge_memory.c, hugetlb.c, and userfaultfd.c. The changes are purely mechanical and do not alter any behavior. The patch also updates ftrace strings to keep existing trace-based tooling compatible.
